title: tephrosia retusa
intro: Tephrosia retusa, also known as the "Blackbead" or "Black Acacia", is a small, deciduous shrub native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia retusa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tephrosia retusa is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to promote overall health and well-being.
